genus_agent_state.message: 6 areas seeded for a DTC + small wholesale roastery. Install Strategy + Finance modules to wire Stewards; connect Stripe test / GA4 demo / Shopify dev / HubSpot sandbox for live-flowing data.

areas.description: Cash, revenue (subscription MRR + bag sales + wholesale invoices), COGS, runway.
areas.genus_agent_notes: DTC subscription + small wholesale → revenue is mixed (predictable MRR + lumpy wholesale). Watch CAC payback on new subscribers + wholesale concentration risk.

areas.description: DTC subscriber lifecycle — sign-up, retention, churn, upgrade/downgrade flows.
areas.genus_agent_notes: The load-bearing revenue line. Watch month-2 churn (the cliff) + LTV by acquisition channel.

areas.description: Café accounts — pipeline, orders, account renewals.
areas.genus_agent_notes: 8 active accounts, ~25% of revenue. 2 cafés = 60% of wholesale → concentration risk. CRM in HubSpot sandbox.

areas.description: Web acquisition, social, email, paid. Funnels into subscriptions.
areas.genus_agent_notes: GA4 demo property = ecommerce funnel signal; Klaviyo / Mailchimp for email lifecycle; Meta + Google ads for paid.
Subscription scale = weekly roast plan + fulfillment SLA = on-time delivery rate. Watch green coffee inventory weeks-of-cover.

areas.description: Single-origin lineup, blends, packaging, subscription experience.
areas.genus_agent_notes: Roaster's creative output. NPS + repeat-subscribe rate per coffee.
